text.title: Research Repository Operations Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the Research Repository Operations methodology end-to-end. Each step lists input, action, output, and an optional decision gate.

step.name: sync-ingest
step.action: Pull new sessions; insert with idempotency keys.

step.name: tag-backfill
step.action: Apply tags via Sonnet batch; route ambiguous to human queue.

step.name: dedup
step.action: Hash (source_url + date + segment); merge duplicates; log merge audit trail.
